user.title: Connect Svitgrid
user.description: How would you like to connect to Svitgrid?

menu_options.pair: Pair with the Svitgrid mobile app (recommended)

manual_meta.title: Inverter details
manual_meta.description: Tell Svitgrid about your inverter. The brand and model are shown on the dashboard; phases / battery / PV-strings drive which sensors the next step asks for.

manual_entities.title: Map Home Assistant entities
manual_entities.description: For each field Svitgrid tracks, pick the matching Home Assistant sensor entity. At least one must be set. Skip any field you don't have (e.g. battery sensors on a grid-tie inverter, PV2 if you only have one string).

abort.pairing_expired: The pairing code expired. Try again.
abort.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Check Home Assistant logs.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Svitgrid cloud. Check your internet.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Svitgrid cloud. Check your internet.
error.no_entities_selected: Pick at least one sensor — otherwise the dashboard has nothing to show.
